package.name: sim_dbw_bridge
package.description:
Simulated drive-by-wire translation layer for the GEM E4 digital twin. Implements the SAME state machine (DISENGAGED/ARMED/ACTIVE/ FAULT) and safety gates as the real Teensy firmware (see Software/firmware/common/include/dbw_can_protocol.h), but writes geometry_msgs/Twist to Gazebo instead of CAN frames to a Teensy.
Autonomy code that talks to /dbw/cmd, /dbw/enable, /vehicle/* on the sim should work unchanged on the real cart with the C++ gem_dbw_bridge.
